title: Does Snacking Ruin Your Diet?

scenes.text: Can snacking sabotage your health goals? Let's explore!
scenes.label: MYTH: Snacking is Bad

scenes.text: Many people think that snacking leads to weight gain and bad habits.
scenes.label: MYTH: Snacking Causes Weight Gain

scenes.text: In fact, healthy snacks can help control hunger and prevent overeating during meals.
scenes.label: TRUTH: Healthy Snacks Aid Diet

scenes.text: Follow for simple habits that boost your health.

description: Does snacking ruin your diet? Discover how healthy snacks can actually support your nutritional goals. Follow us for more tips!
